cards.title: Lenten Events
cards.description: Pot-Luck Lunches in the drop-in center on Sunday, 11 a.m., following worship. Exploring Fruit and Gifts of the Spirit series.

cards.title: Bible Study
cards.description: Wednesday Evening Bible Study via Zoom at 8 pm. Open to men and women of all ages. Led by Rev. Dr. Pamela Pater-Ennis.

cards.title: Communion Sundays
cards.description: The first Sunday of each month we receive the Sacrament of Holy Communion. Homebound communion available upon request.

cards.title: Healing Sundays
cards.description: Every 3rd Sunday of each month at our 10am service. Join us for healing prayers and connection.

cards.title: Prayer Requests
cards.description: Submit prayer requests to the church. Call (201) 444-4625 or email pastor@communitychurchgr.com.

cards.title: Community Meals
cards.description: Help support missions in New Jersey and Kenya. Our campus is home to Community Meals, delivering meals to our area's home-bound residents.

outreach.text: Help support us with a financial contribution. We support missions in New Jersey and Kenya. Our campus is home to groups including Community Meals, delivering meals to our area's home-bound residents, and the Glen Rock Co-Op Nursery School.

thrift_shop.intro: Please consider donating your pre-loved items to the Community Thrift Shop in Midland Park and mention or mark your bags CHARITY #3. A portion of the proceeds will go to CCGR.
thrift_shop.items_accepted: in-season clothes, shoes and accessories, small household items, children's toys, books (hard cover must have jacket), paperbacks in good condition.
